seoTitle: Wellesley vs Wellington Mill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wellesley and Wellington Mill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wellesley vs Wellington Mill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wellesley and Wellington Mill.
heading: Wellesley vs Wellington Mill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wellesley, Western Australia and Wellington Mill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wellesley has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wellington Mill (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wellesley or Wellington Mill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wellesley has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Wellington Mill scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wellesley scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Wellington Mill scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wellesley or Wellington Mill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wellesley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
